name: memories
description: Query your Memories.ai video memories from Codex (search, recall, summarize, drill-down).

interface.shortDescription: Search, recall & analyze your video memories
interface.longDescription: Long-term visual memory for Codex: search, recall, and reason over your own indexed video library — by what's seen, said, or described — plus index public URLs, transcribe audio, and discover live-web videos.
